faqSection.label: FAQ
faqSection.title: Common Questions
faqSection.contactText: Can't find the answer you're looking for?
faqSection.q1: How can I place an order?
faqSection.a1: You can easily order via WhatsApp or through our website. Click the 'Order via WhatsApp' button on the product page to contact us directly.
faqSection.a2: Production time for our handmade products varies from 3-14 days depending on the product. Shipping takes 1-3 business days.
faqSection.q3: Can I request a custom design?
faqSection.a3: Yes! Share your custom design requests with us via WhatsApp. We create personalized products based on your color, size, motif, and pattern preferences.
faqSection.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faqSection.a4: We accept bank transfer/EFT and cash on delivery. Payment details are shared via WhatsApp during the ordering process.
faqSection.q5: What is your return and exchange policy?
faqSection.a5: Standard return policy applies to our handmade products. Exchanges are available within 14 days for manufacturing defects.
faqSection.a6: Currently we only ship within Turkey. International shipping requests can be evaluated via WhatsApp.

occasionPages.mainSeoTitle: Custom Design Clothing - Personalized Gift Ideas
occasionPages.mainSeoP1: At Elizim, we create unique, personalized clothing designs for every special occasion. From Valentine's Day to birthdays, graduations to baby showers, we offer designs that make every moment special. Names, dates, special messages, or any motif you want can be added.
occasionPages.mainSeoP2: We provide custom printing and embroidery services on t-shirts, hoodies, sweatshirts, polo shirts, dress shirts, crop tops, and many more clothing types. You can easily place orders via WhatsApp and manage the design process step by step with us. We ship fast and securely across Turkey.
occasionPages.mainSeoP3: Choosing a gift is no longer difficult! Give your loved ones a personalized, thoughtful, and lasting gift. With our designs carefully prepared on quality fabrics with craftsmanship, surprise them and collect unforgettable memories.

sevgililer-gunu.metaTitle: Valentine's Day Custom Design T-Shirt & Gift | Elizim
sevgililer-gunu.metaDescription: Custom t-shirts, hoodies and clothing designs for Valentine's Day. Romantic gifts with names, dates and special messages. Order now via WhatsApp.
sevgililer-gunu.heroDescription: Custom romantic clothing designs to make February 14th unforgettable. With your partner's name, your special date, and meaningful messages.
sevgililer-gunu.ctaTitle: Design a Custom Gift for Your Valentine
sevgililer-gunu.ctaDescription: Tell us your dream design for a romantic surprise. We'll create a unique gift with names, dates, heart patterns, or your special message.
sevgililer-gunu.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order a custom design clothing for Valentine's Day.
sevgililer-gunu.seoTitle: Custom Clothing Design for Valentine's Day
sevgililer-gunu.seoP1: Valentine's Day is the perfect time to show your loved ones how special they are. At Elizim, we create fully personalized clothing designs for February 14th. We can add your partner's name, the date you met, a special quote, or romantic patterns on t-shirts, hoodies, or sweatshirts.
sevgililer-gunu.seoP2: Each design is produced custom per order and is unique. Heart patterns, infinity symbols, handwriting fonts, and many more romantic details — we turn your dream gift into reality. Clothing as a Valentine's Day gift is both practical and meaningful.
sevgililer-gunu.seoP3: Contact us via WhatsApp to start the design process. Share your color, size, pattern, and message preferences, and we'll prepare a custom design for you. Fast shipping across Turkey to arrive by February 14th.

dogum-gunu.metaTitle: Birthday Custom Design Clothing & Gift | Elizim
dogum-gunu.metaDescription: Custom t-shirts, hoodies and sweatshirts for birthdays. Unforgettable gifts with age, name and fun designs.
dogum-gunu.heroDescription: The most creative way to celebrate a birthday! Personalized clothing designs with age, name, and fun patterns.
dogum-gunu.ctaDescription: Tell us your ideas for a clothing design that will make your loved one's birthday special.
dogum-gunu.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order a custom design clothing for a birthday.
dogum-gunu.seoP1: Choosing a birthday gift can sometimes be challenging. With Elizim, you can now give a fully personalized and meaningful piece of clothing instead of standard gifts. The birthday person's name, age, birth date, or a special message can be added.
dogum-gunu.seoP2: From kids to adults, from t-shirts to hoodies, we create birthday-themed designs across a wide range of clothing. Fun fonts, balloons, cake patterns, or a minimalist style — we prepare it according to your preference.
dogum-gunu.seoP3: If you want to give a custom-made gift that will catch everyone's attention at the birthday party, you're in the right place. Order via WhatsApp, and we'll deliver on time.

yildonumu.metaTitle: Anniversary Custom Design Clothing & Gift | Elizim
yildonumu.metaDescription: Custom clothing designs for wedding anniversaries and special dates. Meaningful gifts with couple names and dates.
yildonumu.heroDescription: The most meaningful way to celebrate your anniversary. Personalized designs with couple names, special dates, and romantic patterns.
yildonumu.ctaDescription: Contact us for a unique clothing design to make your anniversary special.
yildonumu.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order a custom design clothing for an anniversary.
yildonumu.seoTitle: Anniversary Gift - Custom Clothing Design for Couples
yildonumu.seoP1: Wedding anniversary, engagement anniversary, or the anniversary of when you first met — every anniversary is worth celebrating! At Elizim, we create custom clothing designs with names and dates embroidered for couples.
yildonumu.seoP2: On crop tops, t-shirts, or sweatshirts, we can add couple names, your anniversary date, and a special message. Romantic, minimal, or fun — we design in whichever style you prefer.
yildonumu.seoP3: Among anniversary gifts, the most meaningful one is personalized and thoughtful. Order via WhatsApp now, and we'll have it ready for your special day.

anneler-gunu.metaTitle: Mother's Day Custom Design Clothing & Gift | Elizim
anneler-gunu.metaDescription: Custom shirts, t-shirts and clothing designs for Mother's Day. Gifts filled with floral patterns and messages special for mom.
anneler-gunu.heroDescription: Clothing personally designed to show your mom how valuable she is. With floral patterns, names, and loving messages.
anneler-gunu.ctaTitle: Design a Special Gift for Your Mom
anneler-gunu.ctaDescription: Let us prepare a custom clothing design for your mom. Floral patterns, handwritten messages, and more.
anneler-gunu.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order a custom design clothing for Mother's Day.
anneler-gunu.seoTitle: Mother's Day Gift - Custom Clothing Design for Mom
anneler-gunu.seoP1: Give your mom an extraordinary gift on Mother's Day. At Elizim, we prepare clothing designs decorated with floral patterns, hand embroidery, and personal messages, specially for moms.
anneler-gunu.seoP2: On shirts, t-shirts, or any clothing, we can add your mom's name, special messages like 'World's Best Mom,' or floral motifs. Each design is carefully made to order.
anneler-gunu.seoP3: This Mother's Day, give your mom not just a gift, but an emotion. Order via WhatsApp, and have your Mother's Day custom design ready.

babalar-gunu.metaTitle: Father's Day Custom Design Clothing & Gift | Elizim
babalar-gunu.metaDescription: Custom polo shirts, t-shirts and clothing designs for Father's Day. Gifts filled with embroidery and messages special for dad.
babalar-gunu.heroDescription: Clothing personally designed to show your dad how special he is. With embroidery, name, and message details.
babalar-gunu.ctaTitle: Design a Special Gift for Your Dad
babalar-gunu.ctaDescription: Let us prepare a custom polo shirt or t-shirt design for your dad.
babalar-gunu.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order a custom design clothing for Father's Day.
babalar-gunu.seoTitle: Father's Day Gift - Custom Clothing Design for Dad
babalar-gunu.seoP1: Give your dad a special, meaningful, and lasting gift on Father's Day. At Elizim, we do custom embroidery and printing on polo shirts, dress shirts, and many more clothing types specially for dads.
babalar-gunu.seoP2: Super Dad, Father of the Year, or your own special message — we can embroider any text you want on your dad's clothing. Elegant, clean designs on quality fabrics, carefully prepared.
babalar-gunu.seoP3: Skip the classic gifts this Father's Day, give your dad clothing that's made just for him. Order now via WhatsApp.

dugun.metaTitle: Wedding & Engagement Custom Design Clothing Set | Elizim
dugun.metaDescription: Bride and groom custom t-shirt sets for weddings and engagements, bachelorette party clothing. Personalized with couple names and dates.
dugun.heroDescription: Custom design clothing to make your wedding and engagement preparations fun and unforgettable. Bride-groom sets, bachelor/bachelorette party outfits, and more.
dugun.ctaDescription: Let us prepare unique clothing with Bride & Groom names, wedding date, and special messages.
dugun.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order custom design clothing for a wedding/engagement.
dugun.seoTitle: Wedding Gift - Bride & Groom Custom Clothing Design
dugun.seoP1: One of the most fun details in wedding preparations is custom clothing! At Elizim, we produce bride-groom couple t-shirt sets, bachelorette party outfits, and wedding keepsake t-shirts.
dugun.seoP2: Bride and groom names, wedding date, text like 'Just Married,' or custom symbols — we design entirely according to your wishes. We also take bulk orders for bridesmaid and groomsmen groups.
dugun.seoP3: Contact us via WhatsApp to make your wedding day or engagement ceremony even more special. We offer special pricing for group orders.

mezuniyet.metaTitle: Graduation Custom Design Clothing & Gift | Elizim
mezuniyet.metaDescription: Custom sweatshirts, t-shirts and clothing designs for graduation. Graduation gifts with school name, year, and special messages.
mezuniyet.heroDescription: Clothing personalized with school name, graduation year, and special messages to make your graduation day special.
mezuniyet.ctaDescription: Let us prepare a custom design piece of clothing that will be worn for years as a graduation keepsake.
mezuniyet.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order a custom design clothing for graduation.
mezuniyet.seoP1: Graduation is one of life's most important milestones. To make this special moment lasting, at Elizim we create graduation-themed custom clothing designs. On sweatshirts, t-shirts, or hoodies, we can add school name, department, graduation year, and special messages.
mezuniyet.seoP2: You can also place bulk orders for your classmates! We design clothing that will be a wonderful keepsake for graduation ceremonies, cap-throwing moments, or class photos.
mezuniyet.seoP3: If you're looking for a meaningful and practical option as a graduation gift, contact us via WhatsApp. We offer special discounts for bulk orders.

yeni-yil.heroDescription: Personalized clothing designs with family names and celebration messages to make the New Year special.
yeni-yil.ctaDescription: Let us prepare custom design clothing for your New Year's party or family celebration.
yeni-yil.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order a custom design clothing for New Year.
yeni-yil.seoTitle: New Year Gift - Custom Holiday Clothing Design
yeni-yil.seoP1: Custom design clothing to match with family, friends, or your partner for New Year celebrations! At Elizim, we create New Year-themed long sleeve t-shirts, hoodies, and sweatshirt designs.
yeni-yil.seoP2: Family names, New Year messages like 'Hello 2026,' snowflake patterns, or fun holiday motifs — we prepare everything according to your wishes. Ideal for clothing that will stand out at New Year's parties.
yeni-yil.seoP3: Give a warm and meaningful piece of clothing as a New Year gift. Order via WhatsApp, and we'll have it ready for New Year's.

bebek.ctaTitle: Design a Special Gift for Baby
bebek.ctaDescription: Let us prepare a cute and personal design for a baby shower or welcome baby gift.
bebek.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to order custom design clothing for a baby shower / baby gift.
bebek.seoTitle: Baby Shower Gift - Custom Clothing Design for Baby
bebek.seoP1: The most meaningful gift for a newborn baby is clothing specially designed for them. At Elizim, we produce custom baby clothing for baby shower parties and welcome baby celebrations.
bebek.seoP2: Special details like the baby's name, birth date, weight, height, or cute messages like 'Hello World' can be embroidered. Designs carefully prepared on cotton, soft fabrics are safe for your baby.
bebek.seoP3: If you're looking for a baby shower gift or want to make a special surprise for a newborn, contact us via WhatsApp. We can also make matching mom-baby sets!
